title: BetterHotbar+ (Transparent)
description: This is a transparent version of the BetterHotbar+ resourcepack. ✨
body:
## 📌 This is a transparent version of the [BetterHotbar+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/betterhotbar+) resource pack. If you are looking for the standard version, click the link. 📌

![title](https://i.imgur.com/V5kgjTe.png)

![hotbar-default](https://i.imgur.com/ojK4hYi.png)
![hotbar-dark](https://i.imgur.com/v1gLMne.png)
## 📚 | ABOUT
• Minecraft Vanilla’s hotbar has not been updated in a long time, and it lacks a bit of modernity. That’s why I made this resource pack 16x with the intention of improving the design of the hotbar, while still staying true to the Vanilla aspect of the game. 💎✨

## 🏷️ | CREDITS
• Resource pack created by [t2rtle](https://modrinth.com/user/t2rtle) (ARR) ©️✨ 

## 📦 | MODPACKS & VIDEOS
• You may freely use this resource pack in any modpack as long as the download remains hosted within the Modrinth ecosystem. ☕✨

• You are also free and welcome to create video/stream content (YouTube, Twitch, TikTok, etc.), and it is not necessary to give credits or link to this page. However, if for any reason you want to provide the download to your viewers, you must link to this page and not distribute the download outside the Modrinth ecosystem. 📽️✨

## 📮 | QUESTIONS
• 01. Can I distribute your resource pack? 📌
> R: **No**. Do not distribute my projects anywhere. 📌
